response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior engineer with strong full-stack, testing, and DevOps credentials, plus relevant C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and a wave-field-synthesis project. However, the role demands modern C++ (or Rust) as a primary daily skill, and the resume shows no recent C++/Rust work — most recent decade is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang. No direct geospatial-routing or navigation-tile pipeline experience, though GIS exposure via GISCollective and Green Map is adjacent.
strengths: GIS/geospatial background via GISCollective and Green Map projects
Strong distributed/low-latency systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of req/sec)
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, and cross-stack adaptability
concerns: No modern C++ experience in the last ~10 years; Rust not mentioned
No direct navigation/routing-tile or map data pipeline experience
Primary recent stack (TS/Node) misaligned with C++-centric role
